features.featureTitle: Completely remove all black and near-black colours from the entire app UI. No background, card, button, badge, text, border, overlay, modal, header, footer, or any other element should use black (#000000), near-black (#111, #1a1a1a, #0a0a0a, or equivalent dark OKLCH values close to 0% lightness). Audit frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css, and tailwind.config.js for any dark-mode or base rules that produce black surfaces or black text and replace them with appropriate light alternatives from the chosen warm palette.

Redesign the global colour palette to a warm, bright, friendly theme using one of the following combos (or a harmonious combination): warm brown/skin-tone (e.g. sandy #F5CBA7, warm beige #FAE5D3, terracotta #E8956D accents) paired with off-white backgrounds, OR a blue/white palette (sky blue #60A5FA family, white #FFFFFF, soft blue-grey #EFF6FF). Choose the palette that gives the most clarity and cheerfulness, remove the current dark/lavender-heavy or any near-black OKLCH tokens, and apply the new palette consistently across: header, footer, navigation pills, active-route indicator, cards, buttons (primary, secondary), badges, banners, modals (YearSelectionModal), the dot-grid background dots, and the SparkParticles pills. Update tailwind.config.js design tokens and frontend/src/index.css CSS custom properties to reflect the new palette. Ensure every page (Home, Share, PostDetail, Dashboard, About, Wishlist) uses the updated tokens.

Fix the SparkParticles component (frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.tsx) so that the 12–20 floating year-label pills ('I'm 1st Year', 'I'm 2nd Year', 'I'm 3rd Year', 'I'm 4th Year') are distributed evenly across the entire viewport — both horizontally (0%–95% of viewport width) and vertically (starting positions spread across 0%–90% of viewport height). The current seeded-random positioning is producing clustering in certain areas; replace the position calculation so particles are spread across a well-distributed grid-like or stratified random layout covering the full screen. Each of the 16 instances should start at a distinct, well-separated position. Also ensure the particles' colours are updated to match the new warm palette (REQ-51) so they do not appear dark or purple.
